states.description: Normal operation with ongoing purchase and delivery obligations
Bakery failed to meet monthly minimum purchase requirement
Bakery exceeded volume rebate threshold for the month
Bakery failed to pay undisputed invoice by due date
Supplier failed to maintain temperature-controlled conditions
Party issued termination notice, waiting for notice period to elapse
Agreement ended, performing final accounting and rebate settlement
Agreement completed with all obligations satisfied

transitions.description: Month ends with purchases below minimum threshold
Bakery returns to compliance with monthly minimum

effects.description: Issue $400 volume rebate credit for exceeding monthly threshold

transitions.description: Bakery exceeds volume rebate threshold and earns credit
Rebate credit applied to monthly statement, returning to normal operations
Bakery fails to pay undisputed invoice by due date

effects.description: Bakery pays outstanding invoice amount

transitions.description: Bakery pays overdue amount and returns to good standing

effects.description: Supplier assumes liability for spoilage due to cold-chain failure

transitions.description: Supplier fails to maintain required temperature-controlled conditions
Cold-chain conditions restored and substitute sourcing resolved

effects.description: 30-day notice period before termination becomes effective

transitions.description: Termination notice period completes, entering final reconciliation

effects.description: Pay any remaining rebate balance within 30 days of final reconciliation

transitions.description: All final obligations settled including rebate payment
Bakery places weekly order by Wednesday
Bakery completes pickup within four-hour window

effects.description: Bakery pays undisputed invoice per standard terms

transitions.description: Bakery pays invoice on time according to standard payment terms

rules.description: Supplier shall sell to Bakery flour, butter, dairy products, yeast, eggs, fillings, paper packaging, refrigerated ingredients, and related bakery supplies (collectively, the 'Products').
While active, Bakery shall purchase not less than $4,500.00 of Products during each calendar month.

triggers.condition: Bakery signs a wholesale breakfast delivery contract requiring weekday deliveries

rules.description: Bakery shall provide a rolling four-week forecast of expected Product needs while a wholesale delivery route is active.

triggers.condition: A wholesale delivery route is active

rules.description: Bakery shall place weekly orders by Wednesday for Products needed the following week unless the parties agree on another ordering schedule.

triggers.condition: Every Wednesday

rules.description: Supplier shall confirm accepted orders by email or portal notice.

triggers.condition: Supplier accepts an order from Bakery

rules.description: If Bakery purchases at least $8,000.00 of Products in a calendar month, Supplier shall issue Bakery a $400.00 credit for that month.

triggers.condition: Bakery purchases at least $8,000.00 of Products in a calendar month

effects.description: Issue $400.00 credit to Bakery

rules.action: apply rebate as credit on next monthly statement
rules.description: Supplier shall apply the rebate as a credit on the next monthly statement unless the Agreement has ended.

triggers.condition: Agreement is ongoing

effects.description: Apply rebate as credit on next monthly statement

rules.action: pay rebate within thirty days after final reconciliation
rules.description: If the Agreement has ended, Supplier shall pay the rebate within thirty days after final reconciliation.

triggers.condition: Agreement has ended

effects.description: Pay rebate within thirty days after final reconciliation

constraints.description: Payment due within 30 days after final reconciliation

rules.action: count returned Products toward rebate threshold
rules.description: Returned Products do not count toward the rebate threshold.

constraints.description: Returned Products excluded from rebate threshold calculation

rules.description: Credits do not count toward the rebate threshold.

constraints.description: Credits excluded from rebate threshold calculation

rules.action: count non-Product charges toward rebate threshold
rules.description: Non-Product charges do not count toward the rebate threshold.

constraints.description: Non-Product charges excluded from rebate threshold calculation

rules.action: make refrigerated Products available for pickup within four-hour window
rules.description: Supplier shall make refrigerated Products available for pickup within a four-hour pickup window confirmed for the applicable order.

triggers.condition: Pickup window confirmed for applicable order

constraints.description: Four-hour pickup window for refrigerated Products

rules.action: hold refrigerated Products in temperature-controlled conditions
rules.description: Refrigerated Products shall be held in commercially reasonable temperature-controlled conditions until pickup or delivery.

rules.action: cooperate in substitute sourcing upon Cold-Chain Shortfall
rules.description: Upon a Cold-Chain Shortfall, Supplier shall cooperate in substitute sourcing, expedited replacement, or reasonable order adjustment.

triggers.condition: Cold-Chain Shortfall occurs

rules.action: responsible for spoilage from cold-chain failure
rules.description: Supplier is responsible for spoilage caused by Supplier's failure to maintain required cold-chain conditions before pickup or delivery.

triggers.condition: Supplier fails to maintain required cold-chain conditions before pickup or delivery

rules.action: responsible for spoilage from Bakery delay
rules.description: Bakery is responsible for spoilage caused by Bakery delay, vehicle failure, failure to maintain refrigeration after pickup, or improper handling after risk of loss passes.

triggers.condition: Bakery delay, vehicle failure, failure to maintain refrigeration after pickup, or improper handling after risk of loss passes

rules.action: pay undisputed invoices according to standard payment terms
rules.description: Bakery shall pay undisputed invoices according to Supplier's standard payment terms.

triggers.condition: Invoice is undisputed and due according to Supplier's standard payment terms

effects.description: Pay undisputed invoice amount

rules.description: Undisputed amounts remain payable when due.

triggers.condition: Undisputed amount due date arrives

effects.description: Pay undisputed amount

rules.description: Pricing, forecasts, customer route volume, recipes, formulas, and business plans are confidential and may be used only to perform this Agreement.
Pricing, forecasts, customer route volume, recipes, formulas, and business plans are confidential and may be used only to perform this Agreement.

rules.action: use confidential information for purposes other than performing Agreement
rules.description: Confidential information may be used only to perform this Agreement.

rules.action: use confidential information for purposes other than performing Agreement
rules.description: Confidential information may be used only to perform this Agreement.
This Agreement may be amended only in writing.
This Agreement may be amended only in writing.
Neither party may assign this Agreement without consent except in connection with a sale of substantially all assets or a merger.
Neither party may assign this Agreement without consent except in connection with a sale of substantially all assets or a merger.

unmappable_rules.description: Products shall conform to the specifications, temperature requirements, shelf-life requirements, labeling, and packaging standards customarily used by Supplier for similarly situated bakery customers.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: WARRANTY is not in the four mappable primitives
PERMISSION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.description: Supplier may accept or reject specialty-item requests depending on availability, supplier capacity, minimum order sizes, and mutually agreed pricing.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.description: Supplier may suspend preferred pricing if Bakery misses the minimum for two consecutive months.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Bakery misses monthly minimum for two consecutive months

effects.description: Preferred pricing suspended

unmappable_rules.description: Supplier may reduce reserved inventory if Bakery misses the minimum for two consecutive months.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Bakery misses monthly minimum for two consecutive months

effects.description: Reserved inventory reduced

unmappable_rules.description: Supplier may require revised forecasts if Bakery misses the minimum for two consecutive months.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Bakery misses monthly minimum for two consecutive months

effects.description: Revised forecasts required

unmappable_rules.description: An order is binding only when accepted by Supplier.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: REPRESENTATION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.description: A 'Cold-Chain Shortfall' occurs if Supplier's temperature-control failure or pickup-window failure materially prevents Bakery from timely using Products for the wholesale breakfast route.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: REPRESENTATION is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Supplier's temperature-control failure or pickup-window failure materially prevents Bakery from timely using Products for wholesale breakfast route

unmappable_rules.description: Supplier may adjust prices for commodity changes, freight increases, labor costs, packaging changes, or supplier cost increases, provided Supplier gives Bakery reasonable advance notice before the adjusted price applies to future orders.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Commodity changes, freight increases, labor costs, packaging changes, or supplier cost increases occur

effects.description: Adjusted price applies to future orders

constraints.description: Reasonable advance notice required before adjusted price applies

unmappable_rules.description: Bakery may dispute an invoice in good faith by written notice describing the disputed amount and reason for dispute.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: PERMISSION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.description: Either party may terminate on thirty days' written notice.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Bakery provides thirty days' written notice of termination

effects.description: Agreement terminates thirty days after notice

constraints.description: Thirty days' notice required for termination for convenience

unmappable_rules.description: Either party may terminate on thirty days' written notice.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Supplier provides thirty days' written notice of termination

effects.description: Agreement terminates thirty days after notice

constraints.description: Thirty days' notice required for termination for convenience

unmappable_rules.description: Either party may terminate for material breach that remains uncured thirty days after written notice.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Material breach by Supplier remains uncured thirty days after written notice

effects.description: Agreement terminates for uncured material breach

constraints.description: Thirty-day cure period for material breach before termination

unmappable_rules.description: Either party may terminate for material breach that remains uncured thirty days after written notice.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Material breach by Bakery remains uncured thirty days after written notice

effects.description: Agreement terminates for uncured material breach

constraints.description: Thirty-day cure period for material breach before termination

unmappable_rules.action: terminate for payment default with shorter cure period
unmappable_rules.description: Payment default may be subject to a shorter cure period if stated in Supplier's credit terms.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: POWER is not in the four mappable primitives

triggers.condition: Payment default by Bakery and shorter cure period stated in Supplier's credit terms expires

effects.description: Agreement terminates for uncured payment default

unmappable_rules.action: assign Agreement in connection with sale of assets or merger
unmappable_rules.description: Either party may assign this Agreement in connection with a sale of substantially all assets or a merger.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: PERMISSION is not in the four mappable primitives

unmappable_rules.action: assign Agreement in connection with sale of assets or merger
unmappable_rules.description: Either party may assign this Agreement in connection with a sale of substantially all assets or a merger.
unmappable_rules.unmappable_reason: PERMISSION is not in the four mappable primitives
